tasks.name: Multiply Two Numbers
tasks.description: Read two integers from stdin and print their product.

tasks.name: Even or Odd
tasks.description: Read an integer from stdin and print `Even` if it is even or `Odd` if it is odd.

tasks.name: Reverse a String
tasks.description: Read a single word from stdin and print it reversed.

tasks.name: Find the Maximum
tasks.description: Read an integer N followed by N integers. Print the largest integer.

tasks.name: Count Vowels
tasks.description: Read a single word from stdin and print the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — lowercase only) it contains.

tasks.name: Sum of Array
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N integers. Print their sum.

tasks.name: Celsius to Fahrenheit
tasks.description: Read an integer temperature in Celsius from stdin. Print the equivalent temperature in Fahrenheit, rounded down to the nearest integer. Formula: F = C * 9 / 5 + 32.

tasks.name: Palindrome Check
tasks.description: Read a single word from stdin. Print `YES` if it is a palindrome (reads the same forwards and backwards) or `NO` otherwise.

tasks.name: Prime Number Check
tasks.description: Read an integer N (N >= 2) from stdin. Print `PRIME` if it is a prime number, or `NOT PRIME` otherwise.

tasks.name: Fibonacci Sequence
tasks.description: Read an integer N from stdin. Print the first N Fibonacci numbers (starting from 0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, ...) separated by spaces.

tasks.name: Matrix Diagonal Sum
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then an N×N matrix of integers (row by row). Print the sum of the elements on the main diagonal (top-left to bottom-right).

tasks.name: Binary to Decimal
tasks.description: Read a binary string (containing only '0' and '1') from stdin and print its decimal equivalent.

tasks.name: Remove Duplicates
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N integers. Print the unique integers in the order they first appear, separated by spaces.

tasks.name: Word Frequency
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N words. Print each unique word followed by its count, one per line, in the order they first appear. Format: `word count`.

tasks.name: Longest Common Subsequence
tasks.description: Read two strings from stdin (one per line). Print the length of their longest common subsequence.

tasks.name: Merge Intervals
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N pairs of integers representing intervals [start, end]. Merge all overlapping intervals and print the resulting intervals, one per line, in the format `start end`, sorted by start value.

tasks.name: Balanced Parentheses
tasks.description: Read a string containing only `(`, `)`, `[`, `]`, `{`, `}`. Print `YES` if the parentheses are balanced and properly nested, or `NO` otherwise.

tasks.name: Spiral Matrix
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then an N×N matrix of integers (row by row). Print all elements in spiral order (clockwise, starting from top-left), separated by spaces.

tasks.name: Next Greater Element
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N integers. For each element, find the next greater element to its right. If none exists, output -1. Print the results space-separated.

tasks.name: Longest Increasing Subsequence
tasks.description: Read an integer N, then N integers. Print the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.
